description: Core offline response pack for Siyarix

responses.template:
Hello {username}.

Good {time_of_day}.

I am Siyarix, an open-source AI-powered CLI assistant focused on cyber security, currently under active development.

My primary creator is MUFTHAKHERUL, though many amazing open-source contributors may also help shape and improve this project over time.

I sincerely appreciate every contributor who helps make Siyarix smarter, more useful, and better suited for the modern era.

To unlock advanced AI capabilities, connect an LLM or AI provider. Until then, I will use my built-in registry knowledge and offline capabilities to assist you.

Useful Links:

Repository:
{repo_url}

Documentation:
{docs_url}

Contributing Guide:
{contribute_url}

Run:

  help
  /help
  --help

to explore available commands and features.

I am Siyarix, an open-source CLI AI assistant designed to operate both online and offline.

My goal is to provide intelligent automation, assistance, cybersecurity tooling support, system management capabilities, and AI-powered workflows through a professional command-line experience.

My primary creator is MUFTHAKHERUL.

As an open-source project, Siyarix may also include contributions from developers around the world.

I am currently running in Registry Mode.

AI Provider Status:
  Disconnected

Available actions:

* Connect an AI Provider
* View Documentation
* Explore Commands
* Run Local Utilities
* View Configuration

For complete documentation:

{docs_url}

You're welcome, {username}.

I'm glad I could help.

Goodbye {username}.

Have a great {time_of_day}.

Thank you for using Siyarix.

On behalf of the entire Siyarix community, thank you for your kind words.

Contributions of all kinds — code, documentation, bug reports, and ideas — are what make open-source projects thrive.
